title: pleasant to the eyes
body:
I think "it" should be nice. by "this" I mean what's in the screenshots. Changes: 
1. Nice dark theme. 
2. A more contrasting book interface. 
3. Translucent pumpkin interface, spyglass. 
4. Correction of lagging blocks, such as: iron bars, plates + item frames, sign to sign, and much more...
